source_note: ENGINE REGRESSION SMOKE TEST.  Expected distance is the value Genoa's CURRENT engine + the vendored FCC tvfm_curves.js dataset produce.  The case exists to detect silent engine drift; it is NOT an authoritative FCC reference (see fm-f5050-golden.json for the curve_reference_validation suite).  Replace with an FCC OET / NTIA reference value to upgrade to authoritative.
